chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 237 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «نِعْمَ اَلْبَيْتُ اَلْحَمَّامُ تُذَكَّرُ فِيهِ اَلنَّارُ وَ يَذْهَبُ بِالدَّرَنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.237 - The Commander of the Faithful (as) said:
'What a good place the bathhouse is, where one is reminded of the Fire (Hellfire) and it removes filth.'
